evidence_hint: src/namespace.ts:20 declares required promptGlob:string; pipeline.ts:19 sets promptGlob:'Prompt-*.md' (hardcoded). grep shows namespace.ts never reads cfg.promptGlob — resolveNamespace reads only cfg.namespace and cfg.namespaceGlobs.
residual_if_not_resolved: Remove promptGlob from NamespaceConfig (and the hardcoded value in toCfg), or consume it where prompt globbing is decided.
